name: Enter project scope and name (i.e., @my/project), and optionally change version and other details (for PWA) below.

scripts.test:build: docker build --progress=$([ -n "$VERBOSE" ] && echo 'plain' || echo 'auto') --build-arg APPS=${APPS} --build-arg SKIP_APP_FILE=${SKIP_APP_FILE} --build-arg ENV=testing -t $(echo ${npm_package_name} | sed 's/@//'):${npm_package_version}.$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)-TESTING .
scripts.test:data: docker run --rm -d -e POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust -p 5432:5432 --name $(echo ${npm_package_name}_data | sed 's/@//' | sed 's/\//_/') vitruviantech/postgis:13-master
scripts.test:start: touch .env && docker run --rm -it --env-file=.env -e VERBOSE=${VERBOSE:-} -e ENV=testing -e ABORT_ON=failed_migration -e DATABASE_SOURCE_URL=postgresql://postgres@$(docker inspect -f '{{range.NetworkSettings.Networks}}{{.IPAddress}}{{end}}' $(echo ${npm_package_name}_data | sed 's/@//' | sed 's/\//_/')):5432/postgres -p ${PORT:-8080}:3000 --name $(echo ${npm_package_name} | sed 's/@//' | sed 's/\//_/')_codelaunch $(echo ${npm_package_name} | sed 's/@//'):${TAG:-${npm_package_version}.$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)-TESTING}
scripts.test:stop: docker kill $(echo ${npm_package_name}_codelaunch | sed 's/@//' | sed 's/\//_/'); docker kill $(echo ${npm_package_name}_data | sed 's/@//' | sed 's/\//_/')
